name: NGH Credit Union
description_short: NGH Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative based in Nashville, TN, providing banking and financial services to its members since its founding.
description_long:
NGH Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union located in Nashville, Tennessee, operating under 501(c)(14) tax-exempt status as a mutual financial organization. The credit union was established to serve the financial needs of its membership base in the Nashville area, with headquarters at 1818 Albion Street. As a credit union, NGH operates on a cooperative model where members are owners rather than customers of a for-profit institution.

Based on publicly available information, NGH Credit Union provides standard financial services to its membership, consistent with typical credit union offerings. The organization maintains a physical branch location in Nashville and operates a website at nghcu.com for member access and information. As a credit union, the institution would typically offer deposit accounts, lending products, and other financial services designed to meet member needs.

NGH Credit Union's distinguishing characteristic as a member-owned cooperative is that profits are returned to members through better rates and lower fees rather than distributed to shareholders. The credit union's tax-exempt status as a mutual financial organization reflects its mission-driven approach to serving its membership base. With total assets of $6.3 million and annual revenue of approximately $496,000, NGH operates as a smaller community-focused financial institution.

Prospective members should note that detailed information about specific products, rates, fees, and membership eligibility requirements is not available in the public data reviewed. Interested individuals should contact NGH directly or visit their website at nghcu.com to learn about current offerings, membership criteria, and whether the credit union serves their geographic area or occupational category.
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure ensures profits benefit members rather than external shareholders
Tax-exempt 501(c)(14) status as mutual financial organization
Physical branch location in Nashville, TN for in-person banking services
Established financial institution with $6.3 million in total assets
Online banking platform available at nghcu.com for member convenience
cons: Limited publicly available information about specific products, rates, and fees
Smaller institution ($6.3M assets) may have fewer services than larger credit unions or banks
Membership eligibility requirements not disclosed in available data
No details available about lending products, loan terms, or qualification criteria
Geographic or occupational membership restrictions may apply
best_for: Nashville-area residents seeking local banking with community focus
Members of specific occupational groups or associations served by the credit union
Individuals preferring member-owned institutions over for-profit banks
diagnosis: NGH Credit Union is best for Nashville-area residents and eligible members seeking community-focused banking from a member-owned cooperative. The primary caveat is that specific product details, rates, fees, and membership requirements must be verified directly with the credit union, as comprehensive information is not publicly available.
